title: Pets for adoption from SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many adorable dogs, cats, puppies and kittens eagerly waiting for their forever homes.


> Come and meet these furry friends in Ossie Urban Road, Tamsui Industria, and find your perfect match.


For more information or to adopt, phone 044 878 1990.

Murphy is a small-to-medium crossbreed with the cutest big ears and a lovely disposition. He gets along well with other dogs and is energetic, but not excessively so. What a great family pet or running companion!

Jackson is full of fun and energy. This crossbreed teenager will probably grow to be a medium-sized dog and will need space and exercise. He would love a friend, but it will have to be a bigger dog that makes Jackson tow the line. Surely you will not get bored with this livewire in your home.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
